scenarios.name: calm_clear_control
scenarios.pressure: low uncertainty, low hazard, stable social access; affective machinery should be rejected

scenarios.name: fear_hazard_attention
scenarios.pressure: hazard proximity, injury risk, and low visibility require fear-like risk and attention control

scenarios.name: stress_need_arbitration
scenarios.pressure: low energy, sleep debt, commitments, and incompatible needs require stress-like arbitration

scenarios.name: trust_affiliation_social
scenarios.pressure: help, deception, repair, and repeated cooperation require trust and affiliation control

scenarios.name: frustration_curiosity_switching
scenarios.pressure: repeated failure and high but tolerable uncertainty require strategy switching and inspection

scenarios.name: guilt_commitment_repair
scenarios.pressure: failed promises and harmful actions reduce future social access unless repaired

scenarios.name: restore_affective_continuity
scenarios.pressure: after restore, fear, stress, trust, guilt, attention, and memory salience must remain coherent
